description: Letter from Nissim b. Ḥalfon b. Benaya, in Tinnīs, to Nahray b. Nissim, in Fustat. Dating: 7 December 1060. Among many other matters, Nissim reveals that he has recovered from his illness and left the house and returned to work today for the first time (r10-11). ASE.
tags: trade, illness letter 969-1517, Illness, illness: mention, Nahray B. Nissim
description_he: מכתב מנסים בן חלפון בן בניה, תינניס, לנהריי בן נסים, פוסטאט, 7 בדצמבר 1060. הבריא ממחלה וחזר לעבוד.
